rules.statement: Operational knowledge MUST NOT be hardcoded in files when a database representation exists.
Source code, logs, and prompts MUST NOT contain raw secret values or API keys.
Every code symbol record in the database MUST have a corresponding vector entry in the memory layer.

The Pydantic class `CheckResult` at `src/body/services/cim/models.py` MUST declare fields that conform to the canonical Finding data contract at `.intent/enforcement/contracts/Finding.json`. The contract declares the minimum-required field nucleus per ADR-056 D3; classes claiming to be a Finding surface must satisfy this nucleus. Drift between the class declaration and the contract is a constitutional violation.
